author: @makerslife
text: It works through electrostatic capacitance. When the moisture from your breath passes over the crystalline structure, it creates a bipolar magnetic junction. This juction creates an oscilation that generates an electrostatic charge, getting stored with the lattice structure. When the lattice structure is saturated, the electrons start to move in unison. Once they reach a specific resonance, it excites the electrons to release photons and z band radiation.
